name: Super Mario World
description: Super Mario World is an action platforming game.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Ring Link
options.description: Whether your in-level coin gain/loss is linked to other players

options.label: Trap Link
options.description: Whether your received traps are linked to other players

options.label: Goal
options.description: Determines the goal of the seed Bowser: Defeat Koopalings, reach Bowser's Castle and defeat Bowser Yoshi Egg Hunt: Find a certain number of Yoshi Eggs

options.label: Bosses Required
options.description: How many Bosses (Koopalings or Reznor) must be defeated in order to defeat Bowser

options.label: Max Yoshi Egg Cap
options.description: Maximum possible number of Yoshi Eggs that will be in the item pool If fewer available locations exist in the pool than this number, the number of available locations will be used instead.

options.label: Percentage Of Yoshi Eggs
options.description: What Percentage of Yoshi Eggs are required to finish Yoshi Egg Hunt

options.label: Dragon Coin Checks
options.description: Whether collecting 5 Dragon Coins in each level will grant a check

options.label: Moon Checks
options.description: Whether collecting a 3-Up Moon in a level will grant a check

options.label: Hidden 1Up Checks
options.description: Whether collecting a hidden 1-Up mushroom in a level will grant a check These checks are considered cryptic as there's no actual indicator that they're in their respective places Enable this option at your own risk

options.label: Bonus Block Checks
options.description: Whether collecting a 1-Up mushroom from a Bonus Block in a level will grant a check

options.label: Blocksanity
options.description: Whether hitting a block with an item or coin inside will grant a check Note that some blocks are excluded due to how the option and the game works!

options.label: Bowser Castle Doors
options.description: How the doors of Bowser's Castle behave Vanilla: Front and Back Doors behave as vanilla Fast: Both doors behave as the Back Door Slow: Both doors behave as the Front Door "Front Door" rooms depend on the `bowser_castle_rooms` option "Back Door" only requires going through the dark hallway to Bowser

options.label: Bowser Castle Rooms
options.description: How the rooms of Bowser's Castle Front Door behave Vanilla: You can choose which rooms to enter, as in vanilla Random Two Room: Two random rooms are chosen Random Five Room: Five random rooms are chosen Gauntlet: All eight rooms must be cleared Labyrinth: Which room leads to Bowser?

options.label: Level Shuffle
options.description: Whether levels are shuffled

options.label: Exclude Special Zone
options.description: If active, this option will prevent any progression items from being placed in Special Zone levels.

options.label: Boss Shuffle
options.description: How bosses are shuffled None: Bosses are not shuffled Simple: Four Reznors and the seven Koopalings are shuffled around Full: Each boss location gets a fully random boss Singularity: One or two bosses are chosen and placed at every boss location

options.label: Swap Donut Gh Exits
options.description: If enabled, this option will swap which overworld direction the two exits of the level at the Donut Ghost House overworld tile go: False: Normal Exit goes up, Secret Exit goes right.

options.label: Display Received Item Popups
options.description: What messages to display in-game for items received

options.label: Junk Fill Percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of non-required Yoshi Eggs in the item pool with random junk items (only applicable on Yoshi Egg Hunt goal)

options.label: Trap Fill Percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of junk items in the item pool with random traps

options.label: Ice Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the level to become slippery

options.label: Stun Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which briefly stuns Mario

options.label: Literature Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the player to read literature

options.label: Timer Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the timer to run low

options.label: Reverse Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes the controls to be reversed in the current level

options.label: Thwimp Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of a receiving a trap which causes a Thwimp to spawn above the player

options.label: Autosave
options.description: Whether a save prompt will appear after every level

options.label: Early Climb
options.description: Force Climb to appear early in the seed as a local item.

options.label: Overworld Speed
options.description: How fast Mario moves on the overworld

options.label: Music Shuffle
options.description: Music shuffle type None: No Music is shuffled Consistent: Each music track is consistently shuffled throughout the game Full: Each individual level has a random music track Singularity: The entire game uses one song for overworld and one song for levels

options.label: Sfx Shuffle
options.description: Shuffles almost every instance of sound effect playback Archipelago elements that play sound effects aren't randomized None: No SFX are shuffled Full: Each individual SFX call has a random SFX Singularity: The entire game uses one SFX for every SFX call

options.label: Mario Palette
options.description: Mario palette color

options.label: Level Palette Shuffle
options.description: Whether to shuffle level palettes Off: Do not shuffle palettes On Legacy: Uses only the palette sets from the original game On Curated: Uses custom, hand-crafted palette sets

options.label: Overworld Palette Shuffle
options.description: Whether to shuffle overworld palettes Off: Do not shuffle palettes On Legacy: Uses only the palette sets from the original game On Curated: Uses custom, hand-crafted palette sets

options.label: Starting Life Count
options.description: How many extra lives to start the game with
